title: phyllanthus nozeranianus
intro: Phyllanthus nozeranianus, also known as Nozeran's Phyllanthus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. It is native to the island of Madagascar and is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant has been found to possess anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving immune function. Phyllanthus nozeranianus is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for medicinal use, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential benefits and applications.
